name: Royal Enfield 12mm DU AP Rounds (box of 25)

system.notes: Special round for the H&K MPK-2020 (SAS/SBS issue). Pre-fragmented semi-AP depleted-uranium cap; treat as AP, damage doubled if it penetrates; '95% of human targets hit by this round die'. Extremely rare, illegal outside BCF. RGUK p.35. | [Audit row +370 — Rough Guide to the UK p.35]
system.source: Rough Guide to the UK p.35
